events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Brian May, the legendary guitarist and songwriter for Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite May riff or solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, turns 83 today.

angles.name: Endless Energy
angles.copy: Still strutting and singing! Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger. What's your top Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the US, forever changing the music landscape with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with the ironic first video 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it? Or did it just change the game?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring anthems like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on this day in 1969, bringing "3 Days of Peace & Music" to half a million people.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, the legendary Woodstock Festival kicked off. What's your dream festival line-up, past or present?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 today.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 today. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: A tribute to the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 today. His sound continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. The music, the cover – it's all legendary. What's your go-to track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are as powerful as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the iconic voice of Oasis, turns 54 today.

angles.name: Mad Fer It
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' re-released
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since its initial release and 49 years since its UK single re-release, John Lennon's 'Imagine' still resonates. What does the song mean to you?

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, promising "1,000 songs in your pocket."

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the original iPod, changing how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: It's James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today.

angles.name: A Message of Peace
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His message of peace and love lives on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor John Cleese turns 87 today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite Cleese moment?
